title: Add a currency field to listings
prompt: Add a `currency` column to the listings table (ISO-4217, not null, default 'USD'), expose it on the ListingDTO, and backfill existing rows. Keep the change scoped to the catalog domain.
acceptanceCriteria: listings schema declares a non-null currency column with default 'USD'
a migration backfills existing rows and is renamed to describe the change
ListingDTO exposes currency and the query maps null → undefined
the currency type is defined once in packages/db and re-exported (no independent const)

attempt.summary: Added currency column + CURRENCIES const in db, generated + renamed migration, extended the DTO projection, re-exported the type through packages/types, added an integration test.
